subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto them that recognize: verily, there is no God but Me, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. The Balance hath appeared and the Proof hath come forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لقوم یعرفون انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم قد ظهر المیزان و اتی البرهان و
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
